name: Nothing Ear (a)
confidenceReason: AutoEq contains direct Nothing ear (a) measurements from DHRME and RTINGS B&K 5128.
notes: Budget Nothing in-ear model with strong value and bass enhance support. Keep bass boosts controlled because Bass Enhance can already add low-end weight.
defaultBassEnhance: Off for clarity, level 1 for pop/reggaeton
knownRisks: bass enhance can stack too much low end
presence/treble can become sharp at high volume
